Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue To County Of Marin
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS MICHAEL COVARRUBIAS, GATEWAY APARTMENT PARTNERS, LP, TMG PARTNERS, INC. AND J. DAVID MARTIN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO COUNTY OF MARIN is granted pursuant to CCP 397. Defendants have presented declarations from non-party witnesses that support transfer. In addition, the property is in Marin County, records are in Marin County and building inspectors are also located in Marin County. Transfer the action to Marin County. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
